content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend projectName = tostring(customDimensions["project-name"])
| extend totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens) by projectName
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: 프로젝트별 총 토큰 사용량

content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend projectName = tostring(customDimensions["project-name"])
| extend totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens) by bin(timestamp, 1d), projectName
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: 프로젝트별 일별 추이

content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["model"])
| extend totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens) by model
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: 모델별 사용량

content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend subscriber = tostring(customDimensions["subscriber"])
| extend totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens) by subscriber
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: 사용자별 총 토큰 사용량

content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend subscriber = tostring(customDimensions["subscriber"]),
         projectName = tostring(customDimensions["project-name"]),
         promptTokens = todouble(customDimensions["prompt-tokens"]),
         completionTokens = todouble(customDimensions["completion-tokens"]),
         totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| summarize PromptTokens = sum(promptTokens),
            CompletionTokens = sum(completionTokens),
            TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens)
         by subscriber, projectName
| order by projectName asc, TotalTokens desc
content.title: 사용자별 프로젝트별 토큰 사용량

content.query:
traces
| where message == "TokenUsage"
| extend model = tostring(customDimensions["model"]),
         projectName = tostring(customDimensions["project-name"]),
         promptTokens = todouble(customDimensions["prompt-tokens"]),
         completionTokens = todouble(customDimensions["completion-tokens"]),
         totalTokens = todouble(customDimensions["total-tokens"])
| summarize PromptTokens = sum(promptTokens),
            CompletionTokens = sum(completionTokens),
            TotalTokens = sum(totalTokens)
         by projectName, model
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: 프로젝트별 모델별 토큰 사용량

content.query:
let pricing = externaldata(currencyCode:string, tierMinimumUnits:real, retailPrice:real, unitPrice:real, armRegionName:string, location:string, effectiveStartDate:string, meterId:string, meterName:string, productId:string, skuId:string, productName:string, skuName:string, serviceName:string, serviceId:string, serviceFamily:string, unitOfMeasure:string, type:string, isPrimaryMeterRegion:bool, armSkuName:string) [h@'https://prices.azure.com/api/retail/prices?api-version=2023-01-01-preview&$filter=serviceName%20eq%20%27Foundry%20Models%27%20and%20armRegionName%20eq%20%27${location}%27'] with (format='multijson', ingestionMapping='[{"column":"currencyCode","path":"$.Items[*].currencyCode"},{"column":"retailPrice","path":"$.Items[*].retailPrice"},{"column":"meterName","path":"$.Items[*].meterName"},{"column":"productName","path":"$.Items[*].productName"},{"column":"skuName","path":"$.Items[*].skuName"},{"column":"unitOfMeasure","path":"$.Items[*].unitOfMeasure"},{"column":"armRegionName","path":"$.Items[*].armRegionName"},{"column":"serviceName","path":"$.Items[*].serviceName"}]');
pricing
| where retailPrice > 0
| project meterName, retailPrice, currencyCode, unitOfMeasure, productName, skuName
| order by productName asc, meterName asc
content.title: AI Foundry 모델별 단가 (Azure Retail Prices)
